name: filelist-seed-purge
description: Private MV3 extension: purge Done-seeding filelist.io torrents from local qBittorrent.

scripts.build:chrome: node scripts/stamp-version.mjs && tsc && BROWSER=chrome vite build && node scripts/pack.mjs chrome
scripts.build:firefox: node scripts/stamp-version.mjs && tsc && BROWSER=firefox vite build && node scripts/pack.mjs firefox
